name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Will he or won't he? President Biden should follow his predecessor's model of bipartisanship
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23468f569754/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-3610378?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this email finds you well.

I have received emails from quite a few of you asking about COVID-19 relief legislation and if President Biden will work with the "Gang of 10 Republicans" to broker a bipartisan bill. I have put a short note together with my thoughts. Feel free to email me with you feedback.

_**Will he or won't he? Biden should follow his predecessor's model of bi-partisanship**_

For a president who promised unity and healing for a divided nation, President Joe Biden is off to a failing start.

Rather than focusing on the challenges facing Americans during a COVID-suppressed economy, President Biden has rushed through at least 42 Executive Orders according to CNN, on controversial issues like climate change and immigration. Couple this with Democrats’ insistence on moving forward with impeaching the former president and you can see why the 75 million Americans who didn’t vote for Joe Biden would be skeptical of his inaugural speech promising to heal and unite the country.

With a massive COVID stimulus bill on the horizon, and with more relief to follow, yesterday 10 Republican Senators --Susan Collins (ME), Lisa Murkowski (AK), Mitt Romney (UT), Todd Young (IN), Jerry Moran (KS), Bill Cassidy. (LA), Shelley Moore-Capito (WV), Mike Rounds (SD), Rob Portman (OH), and Thom Tillis (NC) -- penned a letter to President Biden hoping to turn his uplifting words from Inauguration Day into meaningful action for the American people.

Specifically, the cabal of Republicans requested a meeting to discuss a narrowly targeted COVID relief bill that includes provisions from the two previous relief measures such as unemployment benefits and vaccine development and distribution. They also seek to scale down the enormous cost of the $1.9 trillion bill after having just spent $4 trillion on COVID relief measures since the start of the pandemic in March. On _Fox News Sunday_ , Senator Bill Cassidy said their counterproposal has a price tag of “about $600 billion” – a significant reduction from the size and scale of President Biden’s bill.

The Republicans’ cuts could come from potential ‘non-starter’ provisions, such as:
- **$350 billion in aid to states** , like New York where its residents are fleeing because of Governor Cuomo’s refusal to open the economy back up and his handling of the virus.
- **$170 billion for schools to “open safely” **when President Biden has sided with the unions who refuse to allow teachers to go back to their jobs of teaching our children
- $20 billion for “hard hit” transit agencies, which is virtually a bailout that favors large urban areas whose transit systems have been poorly managed for decades
- **$1,400 in aid to couples** earning $174,000 jointly and an expansion of these funds to include those who are an undocumented spouse lacking a Social Security number
- **$15 Federal minimum wage mandate **during an economic downturn, when a record number of businesses have shuttered, and employees are struggling to find work.

For all the talk about former President Donald Trump not working well with Democrats in Congress, he sure was able to achieve bi-partisan legislative victories and on COVID relief bills, he succeeded not once but twice in passing _bipartisan_ bills.

President Biden could adopt President Trump’s philosophy, but he and Senate Democrats are digging in their heels and sharpening their ‘legislative tools’ like budget reconciliation and abolishing the filibuster which allows Democrats to have only a simple majority to ram legislation through Congress. With eliminating the filibuster, Democrats can freely pass non-starter bills like adding seats to the federal bench, better known as “court packing” and giving Washington, D.C. and Puerto Rico statehood.

As a lawyer in the Congress in 2009, I advised on the $787 billion stimulus bill that didn’t garner a single Republican vote in the Senate. Former President Barack Obama touted the “shovel ready” infrastructure projects would get Americans back to work, only to state a year after its passage, _“There is no such thing as shovel ready projects”. _The stimulus law ended up becoming one of the Democrats’ biggest political liabilities in the 2010 mid-term elections, right behind Obamacare.

President Biden is meeting with the group of Senate Republicans this afternoon, but will he include their input in the next COVID relief bill? Failure to do so would be a fatal mistake. One that will immediately position him as a partisan who will go-at-it-alone just to eek out a victory, and one that will ‘poison the well’ with key Republicans he will need as Democrats Joe Manchin (WV), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ) demonstrate independence from their Party bosses.

Will President Biden demonstrate he has the chops, like President Trump, to work with the opposing party and hammer out legislation or will he take the easy way out with procedural tools to shut out the minority? Only time will tell, but in his first 100 days President Biden would be wise to score a bi-partisan victory and COVID-19 relief may be the only legislative vehicle he has that gets him there.

You can follow me on:
**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Thank you!
Amanda Makki
---

name: Roger Misso
subject: Help us flip Wisconsin's U.S. Senate seat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we are working to restore honor and integrity to the United States Congress. Normally, that work takes the form of supporting veterans and military family members for Congress. Today, we're introducing a new way to support good government.

With the balance of power in the Senate at stake next year, we are proud to announce the launch of the [_**Vets Flip Wisconsin Fund**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/py5l0CK51SMmchpXdy454XvVowQCZnojLvm-ahogdR4=)[,](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/py5l0CK51SMmchpXdy454XvVowQCZnojLvm-ahogdR4=) an effort to take back a competitive U.S. Senate seat from dishonest Trump- and QAnon-supporting Senator Ron Johnson. Our work will support voter outreach, registration, and mobilization efforts to win this seat - and when a Democratic nominee is announced, our veterans will be their first major donors! This is a tall task, but after our Vets Flip Georgia Fund helped win two U.S. Senate run-offs in Georgia, we know we can do this!

That's why we need **_you._** We want to make sure honor and integrity can win in Wisconsin, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/py5l0CK51SMmchpXdy454XvVowQCZnojLvm-ahogdR4=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $5000! Will you help us win Wisconsin by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/py5l0CK51SMmchpXdy454XvVowQCZnojLvm-ahogdR4=)

Thank you for your support. Veterans helped shape U.S. Senate races across America in 2020 - [help us do it again in 2022!](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/py5l0CK51SMmchpXdy454XvVowQCZnojLvm-ahogdR4=)

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3kDH3RqDakjFmOavJnCGkAXEIiX2Ddx75ZiKcZa2XA=/CyRXYcziRKwJ8ca1mwxMFDbgko0m8w8Z0BYVBmbaLN8=)_

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: It’s time for a California comeback!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
California is in desperate need of a comeback. We need change at the top, and we need it now.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/dbe42ced62fdd237c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, California is in desperate need of a comeback. We need change at the top, and we need it now. **That’s why I am officially announcing my run for Governor of California.** It’s not going to be easy to beat out the progressive establishment, but I’ve done it before. As the Mayor of San Diego, I took on the promise-breakers, the corruption, and the waste, and together with the support of San Diegans, we cleaned up America’s Finest City. Now I’m ready to take that same bold plan of action to the state level, and defeat Gavin Newsom once and for all. Frustration with Governor Newsom has reached an all-time high because of his failings and hypocrisies while mismanaging the pandemic. And it just keeps getting worse. _Even before the COVID-19 crisis, homelessness was skyrocketing, businesses and jobs were leaving, and our overall quality of life was decreasing._

California is better than this. We are the land of innovators and visionaries who create and build. The ruling class has broken its promises to the Golden State over and over, but they can’t break the promise of California — the promise of YOU. I’m ready to lead the charge to overthrow the status quo in California, and return our beautiful state to its former golden glory. But I can’t do it without you, Peter. **Will you join our growing group of grassroots supporters by chipping in what you can now to help my campaign?** [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/a153dde4b116d336c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/2cf40a56cc7db6aec3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/12c2c46b646ee34bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/3cac7d8c0a726498c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/33e9d3093c05fb09c3d6b838967d376c/34943) I know I can take on Newsom and his special interest supporters, because they do NOT represent the good people of California, and they are certainly not serving our citizens well. I have the experience it’s going to take to unite people of all parties and backgrounds to get results that matter. If we work together, I know we’ll be unstoppable. Thanks for your support,
Kevin Faulconer [**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/ba5a0d96e52e4ae8c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/bfb8265c7414a1cdc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/5dabb62f7315bf4bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/0d73a3b366a30fa5/2fec19fe544e4d84c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Amanda Edwards
subject: Big Announcement! Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Big Announcement! Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is here!
---
| | |
---|---
|
In light of the challenges we have faced as a community during the pandemic, I am beyond excited to announce the launch of my brand new 501(c)(3) non-profit organization - Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization. Be The Solution seeks to engage, encourage, educate, equip and empower residents to "be the solution" in their respective communities. From the Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference to An Evening of Women's Empowerment, we provide opportunities for community members to thrive, grow and address the challenges they face. In light of the pandemic, we will identify opportunities to empower residents in meaningful, safe and thoughtful ways that are free and accessible to the public.
|

From the Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference to An Evening of Women's Empowerment, we provide opportunities for community members to thrive, grow and address the challenges they face. Registration for this virtual event will open on February 16th. | | | Registration for this event opens February 16th. name: Heidi Sloan
subject: Keep Fighting for Homes Not Handcuffs!
body:
| |
---
Friend, I'm writing with urgency because an issue deeply dear to my heart is once again making news in Austin. Our unhoused neighbors, the number of whom have increased during this time of global precarity and deep suffering, are under threat. You see, over the past three years, I've gotten to organize with an incredible coalition of advocates, allies and directly impacted folks to demand Homes Not Handcuffs. And we have helped move Austin to decriminalize the necessary acts of sleeping, sitting, and camping outside as well as asking for money to survive. While we won these changes, the struggle to replace the carceral state with real social services and housing has relentlessly continued. Throughout all of it, we have refused to drive people without housing back into hiding and away from the places they feel safe and able to connect with live-giving services. The great news is that Austin is making progress. Just last week, the city of Austin purchased a hotel to transform into public supportive housing. This makes the third such purchase, with one more on the table for this week's council meeting. Private entities and service providers are feeling the pressure too, to provide real solutions in the form of housing with wrap around, individualized care. Next month, a city-wide summit will convene with stakeholders from all walks to generate resources and cooperative investments. But the pursuit of recriminalization from[ Governor Abbott](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGBCTpdbNEMuoEbPbPDnKLJEiLhobu4BDrwBl0i2D3s-b_uRrdVxlFiqe4sqh4nE_A413S04gnZG8qaEJMemUpmP1MoGlauc45dWrmWhM1NLMqoW2Zy44WJiHWa8tzgOdr9q3VNN17UscVd-YyLybWivpbv9D8VYDUGz__U48WTpsWQCN-rE7rmLmO7sHDTYOHrQvKqvnSeuSsi8j1emLa6tl5Mx2EeNjnGjFSVc3hYnWP2eUrwEEljM2Sge9LVL2g7mF_2orWjyVYJCyhUckEaOxaPCCpyuTNMurHzhQCXTMEGPBNIKoJ675blZkfFaMMpbnNdvhSizcr7P-qKYfz1ClNvjkvaqdsN7NYGrTPOMJ1nFCCZd-9Dx-7QyC1j4wA/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h0/BQgHS9FeMBbFpEERBdjmNH1QPU7rX2E_SQ4lvxzLJ6Q), [Save Austin Now's deceptive and harmful ballot campaign](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMrQBSuKpus1cpSlE_T7bYfkJPoj0lP-JzwtNWMC_9pYplM5SU-FN_eMhtnreoMpyUz0mMFYGAES7pj176SVIp3lOI_ID7AV2z6XeY002L4zm9ZoMv_W357IHD8b9HeNLAfU_9ILJBFiol20p8fc22U_c7Cqk3-_UhGqtQbyoZOoL3I29edBHw4NFIVpPmZRpw1MfB3CF9IQTDaHm4D1AmGF-qZ7lN7hDxiAJfqOQWCIdjLpdLyNmvcrBIcBS8hkXKIfY4DGLJOgKnlgm3CPscDubHBj-_j6xi_mVDUOEGysW2m-KquBMEsLoQEIhAA3plFqn1-rTo3drtJnbTMgoO42riTx2J-hsvyhk5tRRjWRIHGnXVhcIx-d_0Hhxdx-GqHnNDCp7q96K8Z2n7tW-r8/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h1/qeJFrE9RIGyWV3fAMqCqDdu6O0Hf9drwyjfVci9UWZs), and now from a new city initiative called [HEAL](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG04p4qiYrvSPD3b1FDGf4rJFxZdHM4Htlr_JAf4l3LJ0NK31oVroJUxG1gNNwxM2-Jh9WMU91cIh6t_cpYigeOOd11xDDTjnICmyxxByR8BP-hOeq1FcbtK_pc0VyB_hn7ewjnM-e3-9MW4tF2T6eQZVPpv8CKYcXRwAIoswntTZYEqynQcbLPCHekwHz7Be-fbokmU1xajkJ-ZE6nsehQVlnk7JtbUa7FsRV8BgKGZFQp6thFraZfqDR3WITCxSCwExikB3X7m6FkR7PMhE8S6gANxGua4Tl1nlJRffqz3_YJr4A86oLCI1ig4FTrZ2rCQiYX076jpHgaENvfChBzRY/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h2/8W0e9LFxjk00p4Da3MZ6vyWCNWPRa8SkWQgPhTcLm8Q) threaten to unravel this momentum. It's our time to push back against the harmful narrative that criminalization is the way to make the problem of homelessness disappear. We know that the carceral state never solves the problem. It only makes it worse. We know that Austin demands housing, and housing without the threat of handcuffs following behind it. Please join us in our fight for freedom and for the human right of a safe place to call home. Follow us on social media: Instagram - [https://www.instagram.com/homesnocuffsatx/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7R7IRw2RsGUI1v-_O2KrcAGWme1zsZPJal2VVwW-5gFkq-ApnZfkNBAct9kD3WeM_euv1HZt1C7xyHM-cqgxuq0ovzGz8qbySdXPgxXuNE0QH5avlvLC4GUrL5nWOhJfP5zdc8vzBqArpSs6-ExEnYjhy1kELaQ7cNpMKrMTAUiiAMhOjnzVxg0wQwWkDH8jIyRSZzB2DpQQ8Gkru6UBv5P6WG5FqS6HBesbJN8AZSU-vIImcaGwXug9dczgDBtWwpMbEKeLBAWLuPXKi-voki2/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h3/2BiI-FK-1cBa8NjTutfL0I9K9Xq95EsKn5i4I6_k2g4) Twitter - [https://twitter.com/homesnocuffsatx](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhljYKf5qCMUvy9jXbGETUFc7J-sP_Lq6BEVqOEwv8NUz5aUA9tL4PJ__cw-qUoHPmUD4ZDs4WoszYI1-aUgp48rcFmEgFr7_M9OlB7A-CWGk_yBw1y_gXKaf3giJSSHrct0sv6WOvjlIwU94YUj5zNNYJs8Ze4K1_Yw6q19IJ-874ZojYmNX9TKIRbJ83niJApDM5uN5wYR51yD9-CE4JCiIOxhq9LqaAkIVNqvm68tkqQuwlQfFWRHbkpj5srLlVs7-1HcoSSDypA34_buSl-4/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h4/whbEbNzMoFIswmtIX9UtxjsQ7Z-EGIkDXI9R-a9zlw0) Facebook - [https://www.facebook.com/ATXHomesNotHandcuffs/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiLG5JCmiU89xuGAtyEQ3M3sWC6KA_KQRvTyUtZiPB3rTAkeZhXXlYqBnnPsfnlmizmjNCjZBT2pafc-BV2ql-w3camLJ-g5uskTJGcJOJEMGiCPoKLkfwXoqdAtzO3b7CqPC6VhrKkf3Z_mFOLjA9ca1YX9nBGzpVqOob8NU52JVBmt8yRwivta2izlB-zwIRK-yTuwW0NWJ1hx0LUtQAeE8lrRBK1ReJ8niuOcd7y5GfZlzAhgnBSMSfgLSOPxVpWzAOPu5wytKTrzl4gMrbf5/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h5/5Yx7nCh2ChTR_CQXSuCM3dXwgdqII0fWf1al3z-89iA)

And if you're in Austin, please contact your council member now and tell them we want Homes Not Handcuffs. Easy instructions [here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/gbiIWaYrNLy64X-nHkLXitDrxZEZu2igERf3dZ3zoE4r7hkJrmmtVvkkXfklA7ZhfocaEXeU0TssAJ1nIrhIqjocUzl5I9JT-a3y8wLlbqcG-fVj9EMjYa-Uycc4YQMoA4ha7TRFvVRPUuSxaYxz-sKWUEu3Nvj7N2dep0pUa5mxT8AmMvG1daWoaSLuw5GixH-wIjVbv58KwLzG1wndx-qVzPMMcvoFDp4jiP7z1QHdOjMqxKiPGhmoP62_KslGyD2LtgAsBzeBKZC8gFrdMtZtejgz2TeGWNJgHncAMYc/393/KfcDqdHlTZW4yZQpshjNUw/h6/L4P3c4jMpjsekw6FRUial27mjRJrcE6Os1eX8YIL75s) Solidarity Forever, Heidi
---

name: Team Cheney
subject: It’s time to Take Back the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
The Biden Administration has made it clear they are only focused on pushing a far-left agenda through executive orders that will kill jobs

**We need to get to work Friend.** The Biden Administration has made it clear they are only focused on pushing a far-left agenda through executive orders that will kill jobs, put national security at risk, and take America down a dangerous path. **We need conservative allies like you to step up and help us take back the House in 2022 so we can stop the liberals in their tracks!**
[HELP TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pHXBkWdZZY92XS04w4qFjPP3e55URs2GfvpUuergdBDxHbHvxfJGaDa8tp3tgqO6AMkjcurEP28I6o0kSAY829DwAV-5ZdNDh-eUUdyPBdSisTBBLIqwmJf8Eb5M_dwmwpiA5TKzuLxrcRgX0QoH2vjnxydTDrkhxz93ID0hTETVmO-CHdMH4_hW21OqbQm_MEhP9-HIbzwXpazl6ReTLYsdG_3yaM7gYWCBsD-dIO4U7iz0WO7evLyVs9FtSiZLyp3_DsJla2oMdxk8YNFbZOEP5mQv592aduuqUEHKtclQ249285AR4rWiZ-yPZlnj3DilWe5Yy3vlYchz8g29NQ6FvPqDaYn5nN4RGd5teQ-20B0Pjm16bPoErg1C6rpuE0Ji5uAOATjhFnLOFO_DHfQKNSgxvcxjiMMsSUKMMcxlgQ3zeBQlg==&c=alXGj731ub_xMg5cns821---FUH51qWAqIr_Vlczn6b-eqP1mUYoNg==&ch=9qlpm8zL8Cpp8EYv9QVvSk_vv9Y6CS4aIxt21NMeEALI5H0teAAxgA==)
Pelosi and other radical Democrats are doing everything they can to jam their far-left agenda through Congress, while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are pushing harmful liberal policies through with the stroke of a pen. name: John Barrasso
subject: I need you to read this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOHN BARRASSO
body:
%%First Name%%, earlier this week, I wrote about how devastating President Biden's climate change orders will be to Western States. You can read it here!

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xSgCEeyztkvQzUWB4k3ivNwPM1VPeK9woKemF_bhpe0fN6JUsabz14co5tBHYEvCvlL0lcJHs1i5nVjyQ6Zq3tv-M2aAiRnOovN2I59ri38VTVFA8wPyyjh_ScHJJd1ybRGAfxARSMhxb5tVfJuGFXg8_wyyJtAImTq3Ysa0-XvhTA2ZfzMk-CIGqdR51y0ccEO6ztkmiB-4hzWUeDl_-Kzecn0fkZY1rzWiBPCxVZv8bCdGMCh9sP9qbmcG0iaZ41u_lAcbGFz__qKTm0vuXxphGe4KykKGW5g_cBGYAtE=&c=7VWtRkmbEFIUkOm3dyOAbUeQASCQ0p4z_7WJdJU1l5XjMqJaIxRpRQ==&ch=eTkVNah34TtWCmWjOX6rSbGU__zu9rhBxD2QgB7dbFHSEB-0oa5EBA==)

Friend, earlier this week, I wrote about how devastating President Biden's climate change orders will be to Western States. You can read it [**here**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xSgCEeyztkvQzUWB4k3ivNwPM1VPeK9woKemF_bhpe0fN6JUsabz14co5tBHYEvCvlL0lcJHs1i5nVjyQ6Zq3tv-M2aAiRnOovN2I59ri38VTVFA8wPyyjh_ScHJJd1ybRGAfxARSMhxb5tVfJuGFXg8_wyyJtAImTq3Ysa0-XvhTA2ZfzMk-CIGqdR51y0ccEO6ztkmiB-4hzWUeDl_-Kzecn0fkZY1rzWiBPCxVZv8bCdGMCh9sP9qbmcG0iaZ41u_lAcbGFz__qKTm0vuXxphGe4KykKGW5g_cBGYAtE=&c=7VWtRkmbEFIUkOm3dyOAbUeQASCQ0p4z_7WJdJU1l5XjMqJaIxRpRQ==&ch=eTkVNah34TtWCmWjOX6rSbGU__zu9rhBxD2QgB7dbFHSEB-0oa5EBA==)!

Biden talks about unity, but his actions are radical. Only weeks into office, he stopped the Keystone XL Pipeline, rejoined the Paris climate accord, and halted new oil, gas, and coal leases on federal lands. He didn't do it by negotiating with Republican members of Congress, but by a few strokes of a pen.

According to the American Petroleum Institute, the federal leasing ban would kill an estimated 62,000 jobs in New Mexico, nearly 120,000 in Texas, and more than 33,000 in Wyoming next year alone. Energy companies will take their investments and jobs overseas, and oil prices will skyrocket. And that's only the beginning.

I won't allow this President to leave Western economies in ruins, Friend. That's why I need you to sign this petition quickly to show this administration we will not sacrifice American jobs.
[**
[SAVE AMERICAN JOBS - SIGN THE PETITION NOW]**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xSgCEeyztkvQzUWB4k3ivNwPM1VPeK9woKemF_bhpe0fN6JUsabz16OdHS_JXpkPHCj4oVrO8SxWBYXPa-kPyuckJCHO2DSpv7tNFFGL17gxs_6SKTwkgVJayn3L-Gt77Q1dJ8AUPd-Tijx4AbxPIR3VFJ4w47CWp11ofLnrXKFiW9pjDbhNRzqj4C7h8Ai4_yLqPCpGtOUVqA5ygTRdJepzQhr_YFHtSLx0aGkn4wS1CVlsCs9ONA9A-RShqZqhWRbQ876QTrxU5S5oXAFDZCPtWloh4xywdOpTzMKdYhms51RZ2934UGEXodJ8YveAdM1Asv1cVHVfzzyRYWtCPaCz5omCMjZhhEDCLRJMz4LbkO1JIEZfCGbjXfD522-oALQ5nISgEAE=&c=7VWtRkmbEFIUkOm3dyOAbUeQASCQ0p4z_7WJdJU1l5XjMqJaIxRpRQ==&ch=eTkVNah34TtWCmWjOX6rSbGU__zu9rhBxD2QgB7dbFHSEB-0oa5EBA==)

As I said in my Op-Ed, the future of global energy is American ingenuity, investment, and innovation. Please take 2 minutes to sign this petition, Friend.
[**
[SAVE AMERICAN JOBS - SIGN THE PETITION NOW]**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xSgCEeyztkvQzUWB4k3ivNwPM1VPeK9woKemF_bhpe0fN6JUsabz16OdHS_JXpkPHCj4oVrO8SxWBYXPa-kPyuckJCHO2DSpv7tNFFGL17gxs_6SKTwkgVJayn3L-Gt77Q1dJ8AUPd-Tijx4AbxPIR3VFJ4w47CWp11ofLnrXKFiW9pjDbhNRzqj4C7h8Ai4_yLqPCpGtOUVqA5ygTRdJepzQhr_YFHtSLx0aGkn4wS1CVlsCs9ONA9A-RShqZqhWRbQ876QTrxU5S5oXAFDZCPtWloh4xywdOpTzMKdYhms51RZ2934UGEXodJ8YveAdM1Asv1cVHVfzzyRYWtCPaCz5omCMjZhhEDCLRJMz4LbkO1JIEZfCGbjXfD522-oALQ5nISgEAE=&c=7VWtRkmbEFIUkOm3dyOAbUeQASCQ0p4z_7WJdJU1l5XjMqJaIxRpRQ==&ch=eTkVNah34TtWCmWjOX6rSbGU__zu9rhBxD2QgB7dbFHSEB-0oa5EBA==)

Thank you for all of your help.

clean_body: %%First Name%%, earlier this week, I wrote about how devastating President Biden's climate change orders will be to Western States. You can read it here! == Friend, earlier this week, I wrote about how devastating President Biden's climate change orders will be to Western States. You can read it ==! Biden talks about unity, but his actions are radical. Only weeks into office, he stopped the Keystone XL Pipeline, rejoined the Paris climate accord, and halted new oil, gas, and coal leases on federal lands. He didn't do it by negotiating with Republican members of Congress, but by a few strokes of a pen. According to the American Petroleum Institute, the federal leasing ban would kill an estimated 62,000 jobs in New Mexico, nearly 120,000 in Texas, and more than 33,000 in Wyoming next year alone. Energy companies will take their investments and jobs overseas, and oil prices will skyrocket. And that's only the beginning. I won't allow this President to leave Western economies in ruins, Friend. That's why I need you to sign this petition quickly to show this administration we will not sacrifice American jobs. [ [SAVE AMERICAN JOBS - SIGN THE PETITION NOW]](==) As I said in my Op-Ed, the future of global energy is American ingenuity, investment, and innovation. Please take 2 minutes to sign this petition, Friend. [ [SAVE AMERICAN JOBS - SIGN THE PETITION NOW]](==) Thank you for all of your help. Senator John Barrasso (R-WY) Republican Senate Conference Chairman == PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOHN BARRASSO | | Friends of John Barrasso | P.O. Box 52008, Casper, WY 82605 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Todd Young
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
We are in unprecedented times. January divided this country in ways we have never seen before. But it's time to build a stronger American future, which is why I wanted to reach out and thank you this morning.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f__DXnhsxOObwkKgVQpf1ACv_1Ul5LelcA1x6N0BnualHlf29fUcBUzHsPtzuowWOcb6l1Yj5BOLagTEJF2mLTwe8cq0U9X6ID_4-zjzUUizscN-5PmbSNUTWS3FnAbsSZ1lYvpamHSkmHjsLvNdnEEkMF9lPhaQFxvOp5YPZ66cgdU8097kVpmjpxmrx5ASiKnGERQDTuLrBMe56uueHBeiTbP7cARpk5VQMpQp_2AKG2-wbPDHZL_PfENfLkyKJuT0tRSFRVFJ8iuwk8JIUs-gIPrstSKZnkWMCw1RNa1FYU1hWFj974poovT7ZXVWc1tkVJJ5ICRn9Hff7NO9UPy4xKyUTMIwfwxTPrKKozZbxn2dC8g3l3OTCsAl3FFul5hUppMjtmYbtp7JcoGspDZfmQAqaAAvnYMfy0uaC-xfnV-QZ_eU8w==&c=VSlb13hLq7XszlyVRQUYXGUdKvFFcHzxiLIhKiLiCab8DxmT2a57vw==&ch=JuujP4s_412ulK315PNYBY0iDxqBwbuPQkBEer7f_zoLMP829elzEw==)
Friend,

We are in unprecedented times. January divided this country in ways we have never seen before. But it's time to build a stronger American future, which is why I wanted to reach out and thank you this morning.

**Because of your support over the past month, I am able to keep my team in the field to continue fighting for our values every single day. **

It's going to be an uphill battle to take back firm control of the Senate from here. Democrats are going to test us in ways we have never seen before. But with your continued support, Republicans have a chance to take back the Majority in 2022 and stop the Left's job-killing agenda.

It's up to us, Friend. We can't back down now.

In Service,
Senator Todd Young

****

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HnpVnzb-b_abKT_qV8TNWY95WapDvMaMN3dzFI-WrQyncrjzfezJmaFjk0KEcX7wn-eNvVmCNeMpUlOAZH5K2UYJieFzJwVGLXLAO87tauSFaHHH46JJ4M1G3xCKQ7ojYu1AWqRnPARacfsd5v1qpEe5qUDqeE0vSaHF87Atm_DMspv0eKaDkGsZ7IFnB9cdJMpmNlBZ04OQm6H8s9OCoIP6Hq-QufjCkw_-1dCEptMy0GAx05TfM2jxuiFEvf6Y7Zam0pudYFVJr1GZYY4qahs7CtW_wN7tk6AhjKmE7lq-3CHo7Q4MQy5YMzfum-WuVlGankZBetEj__7L5X2h_qaNDduD2hqbIQubDa2md9wr8fCdlex0Bh-IE_MuDnR2tr5iYNwuOW8D1UcSHTL39pM_UG8ANDRYu0-Z0pEp31i8k3NITjrUKKT5dj1l6XHOwDIXUQxrpzoGdXvmz7sQtS5xh07x1Ka_&c=02MH56YwxX1qgaUcT5ZfxiUiD7yQGFLm8O8Sz3yVym6G3Hp-HTm3RA==&ch=pckvAqRzCu2x8Cgu7RyP1AZTkNIUVZP3O11kbu8drDGylqK7-nL19w==)

Soaring cost of living

Destroying thousands of jobs overnight

Forcing businesses out due to burdensome regulations and excessive red tape

Lifelong residents fleeing out of state simply to make ends meet._

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are determined to do to the rest of the nation what the Democrats have done to California. [**Friend, can we count on you to chip in to stop the nonsense?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HnpVnzb-b_abKT_qV8TNWY95WapDvMaMN3dzFI-WrQyncrjzfezJmS0S19EhE0KyXHstTwyT2968MM2BxsoIcZ1LKRz-j_-WosYDW8O6oMW1usO-JZQ0D4MU68LxdwweQGoKefJ6zyQxOYXWEmtGt8GRiULu1h2K3xo0KLxy1BZN83pLG4M1tWaqgnMQWE89vNYyHgnr7KZew7T5YR9uoFjQpidJ5qyuuiWvkYpSoyffW4IolhGqv-PR5FuHcFY-fPDPtFeU-JH4m9GvW-lazloNMQNil9gzYs5g-6nARFwkROd7NjHGvirACNyGxHSSCMw3Rtt-JH7v-0jiOUdJu0aatUoHdlBRGnLaUL26Pt7FywfTJgQpudEWGFv8jIis9mqu37MknW1Cy0rJ2iYDxVhrP6WxKZ1p1Wd6FPKzN5GfTxfvQP_3IQiAC_YxcAywVWndh1Wxyj1jPyGEDFv9sDrU4N117oWJ&c=02MH56YwxX1qgaUcT5ZfxiUiD7yQGFLm8O8Sz3yVym6G3Hp-HTm3RA==&ch=pckvAqRzCu2x8Cgu7RyP1AZTkNIUVZP3O11kbu8drDGylqK7-nL19w==)

We have to send a message loud and clear. If failed legislation and unaffordability drive California residents out of our state, where will we go when this legislation is nationalized? We can't afford to risk our next chance to take back the House and restore common-sense leadership in Washington.

Michelle is working toward lower taxes, already returning $400 million back to California taxpayers. She is a small business supporter and job creator, working for a growing economy with small businesses at the core. And above all, she is a loyal California resident who is committed to keeping our state safe, affordable, and out of Socialist rule.

[ _**But she can't do it alone.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HnpVnzb-b_abKT_qV8TNWY95WapDvMaMN3dzFI-WrQyncrjzfezJmS0S19EhE0KyXHstTwyT2968MM2BxsoIcZ1LKRz-j_-WosYDW8O6oMW1usO-JZQ0D4MU68LxdwweQGoKefJ6zyQxOYXWEmtGt8GRiULu1h2K3xo0KLxy1BZN83pLG4M1tWaqgnMQWE89vNYyHgnr7KZew7T5YR9uoFjQpidJ5qyuuiWvkYpSoyffW4IolhGqv-PR5FuHcFY-fPDPtFeU-JH4m9GvW-lazloNMQNil9gzYs5g-6nARFwkROd7NjHGvirACNyGxHSSCMw3Rtt-JH7v-0jiOUdJu0aatUoHdlBRGnLaUL26Pt7FywfTJgQpudEWGFv8jIis9mqu37MknW1Cy0rJ2iYDxVhrP6WxKZ1p1Wd6FPKzN5GfTxfvQP_3IQiAC_YxcAywVWndh1Wxyj1jPyGEDFv9sDrU4N117oWJ&c=02MH56YwxX1qgaUcT5ZfxiUiD7yQGFLm8O8Sz3yVym6G3Hp-HTm3RA==&ch=pckvAqRzCu2x8Cgu7RyP1AZTkNIUVZP3O11kbu8drDGylqK7-nL19w==)

Here in California, we've seen what happens when our jobs, tax dollars, economy, and businesses are in the hands of the Democrats. Now with the House, Senate, and White House turned BLUE, they're determined to make the rest of the nation look like California.

[_**Will you send backup?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HnpVnzb-b_abKT_qV8TNWY95WapDvMaMN3dzFI-WrQyncrjzfezJmS0S19EhE0KyXHstTwyT2968MM2BxsoIcZ1LKRz-j_-WosYDW8O6oMW1usO-JZQ0D4MU68LxdwweQGoKefJ6zyQxOYXWEmtGt8GRiULu1h2K3xo0KLxy1BZN83pLG4M1tWaqgnMQWE89vNYyHgnr7KZew7T5YR9uoFjQpidJ5qyuuiWvkYpSoyffW4IolhGqv-PR5FuHcFY-fPDPtFeU-JH4m9GvW-lazloNMQNil9gzYs5g-6nARFwkROd7NjHGvirACNyGxHSSCMw3Rtt-JH7v-0jiOUdJu0aatUoHdlBRGnLaUL26Pt7FywfTJgQpudEWGFv8jIis9mqu37MknW1Cy0rJ2iYDxVhrP6WxKZ1p1Wd6FPKzN5GfTxfvQP_3IQiAC_YxcAywVWndh1Wxyj1jPyGEDFv9sDrU4N117oWJ&c=02MH56YwxX1qgaUcT5ZfxiUiD7yQGFLm8O8Sz3yVym6G3Hp-HTm3RA==&ch=pckvAqRzCu2x8Cgu7RyP1AZTkNIUVZP3O11kbu8drDGylqK7-nL19w==)

clean_body: If failed legislation and unaffordably drive California residents out of our state, where will we go when this legislation is nationalized? We can't afford to risk our next chance to take back the House and restore common-sense leadership in Washington. . == == Skyrocketing taxes Soaring cost of living Destroying thousands of jobs overnight Forcing businesses out due to burdensome regulations and excessive red tape Lifelong residents fleeing out of state simply to make ends meet. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are determined to do to the rest of the nation what the Democrats have done to California. == We have to send a message loud and clear. If failed legislation and unaffordability drive California residents out of our state, where will we go when this legislation is nationalized? We can't afford to risk our next chance to take back the House and restore common-sense leadership in Washington. Michelle is working toward lower taxes, already returning $400 million back to California taxpayers. She is a small business supporter and job creator, working for a growing economy with small businesses at the core. And above all, she is a loyal California resident who is committed to keeping our state safe, affordable, and out of Socialist rule. == Here in California, we've seen what happens when our jobs, tax dollars, economy, and businesses are in the hands of the Democrats. Now with the House, Senate, and White House turned BLUE, they're determined to make the rest of the nation look like California. == Thank you, California Republican Alerts | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

It's now two days past our January fundraising deadline, and we still have failed to reach our goal.
Friend,
We have major ground to catch up.
It's now two days past our January fundraising deadline, and we still have failed to reach our goal.
If we don't catch up FAST, we risk:
1. **LOSING** upcoming special elections in states like Maine

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Friend,

The Democrats control the House, Senate, and White House. Skyrocketing taxes, a tanking economy, socialized healthcare, thousands of jobs lost.... It's 100% necessary we take back the House for Republicans.

**That 's why we have to ask: are you committed to taking back the House for Republicans and voting RED in 2022?**

**Take the survey using your unique link:**[**https://act.michellesteelca.com/vote-majority**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wGIvDW87LmDhdybhkaeipVD6J-4a-LUYwwwS6YdQJ-xPclJA6dNrGmD3wQsH7biQD9uO_wVyFCSW_YabwJY8N2sPnn7JFeo1zAO-7HokeRBQ-ta2qGwAb-rjBPP5ahqQufFNRcIIhgMlORzn0YvYXCYxVc-6wjiv4uvoN_-f63xIVAbTR9fJp81rG7VVCZL4evsd1XwsvDqen9peL72ph60XeY7hWHTjqYJaXXYhT0NKSUi2n3RrCj1NQc6hEx3C8tkzb2-5zTsjMkdXRpOUx0CeYxat74DesvBFCzEdDPpXG0awOeIy45mLG-okW8y7nHpFok386N4eTHr8V4hvyJpM75_BvynX10zcU4JxwMW-pbF07UvGDOgH4huckwnuxnOaEJmPpdiz5xV32gRSJmqCJFypFWaDn8b4jPlklx4=&c=BX85wQMoVaAcR9fJwxaX1eqWL7lpYOoxbacJgTl1htAdaoEKC0-U4Q==&ch=IzcrNEaR_Na7qC5ohxbkyj7qhRgEGt_lUcqLyFK8HLGv0701-GqQig==)

HARRIET TUBMAN & FREDERICK DOUGLAS TWO OF OUR NATION'S GREATEST ABOLITIONIST AND POLITICAL ACTIVIST HEROES WERE BORN IN DISTRICT 1 MARYLAND Dear Fr
| | [+1](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=362330.1429.1.f04bd72bc1d3fd3860efe98b390780be&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjE4NjMxMDUtMTI4NjAxOTI1NTMtOTcyZTk2YTQ5MmY3ZmI2YjRiNWMwNTM0M2IxMDkzMzBiMjNhMjllMSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMzYyMzMwIn0= "Share this on Google+")

# HARRIET TUBMAN & FREDERICK DOUGLAS
---
## **TWO OF OUR NATION'S GREATEST ABOLITIONIST AND POLITICAL ACTIVIST HEROES WERE BORN IN DISTRICT 1 MARYLAND**
---
__Dear Friends and Supporters, In celebration of BLACK HISTORY MONTH Team Mia is sharing a portion of a 1868 letter to Harriet Tubman from Frederick Douglas. **"The difference between us is very marked. Most that I have done and suffered in the service of our cause has been in public, and I have received much encouragement at every step of the way. You, on the other hand, have labored in a private way. I have wrought in the day – you in the night. I have had the applause of the crowd and the satisfaction that comes of being approved by the multitude, while the most that you have done has been witnessed by a few trembling, scarred, and foot-sore bondmen and women, whom you have led out of the house of bondage, and whose heartfelt, “God bless you,” has been your only reward.** **The midnight sky and the silent stars have been the witnesses of your devotion to freedom and of your heroism."**_**_
---
| | [ BLACK HISTORY IN MARYLAND ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=362330.1430.1.07f4bc79926426de296a36f730a93af2)
---
__Black history is our history. Join us in remembering and honoring Tubman and Frederick, and celebrating the many extraordinary accomplishments of African Americans. Click above and check out Maryland Office of Tourism's great listing of Black History events.
---
Celebrating Black History With You,
Team Mia
---
---

clean_body: HARRIET TUBMAN & FREDERICK DOUGLAS TWO OF OUR NATION'S GREATEST ABOLITIONIST AND POLITICAL ACTIVIST HEROES WERE BORN IN DISTRICT 1 MARYLAND Dear Fr | | = "Share this on Google+" | | HARRIET TUBMAN & FREDERICK DOUGLAS TWO OF OUR NATION'S GREATEST ABOLITIONIST AND POLITICAL ACTIVIST HEROES WERE BORN IN DISTRICT 1 MARYLAND Dear Friends and Supporters, In celebration of BLACK HISTORY MONTH Team Mia is sharing a portion of a 1868 letter to Harriet Tubman from Frederick Douglas. "The difference between us is very marked. Most that I have done and suffered in the service of our cause has been in public, and I have received much encouragement at every step of the way. You, on the other hand, have labored in a private way. I have wrought in the day – you in the night. I have had the applause of the crowd and the satisfaction that comes of being approved by the multitude, while the most that you have done has been witnessed by a few trembling, scarred, and foot-sore bondmen and women, whom you have led out of the house of bondage, and whose heartfelt, “God bless you,” has been your only reward. The midnight sky and the silent stars have been the witnesses of your devotion to freedom and of your heroism."** | | Black history is our history. Join us in remembering and honoring Tubman and Frederick, and celebrating the many extraordinary accomplishments of African Americans. Click above and check out Maryland Office of Tourism's great listing of Black History events. Celebrating Black History With You, Team Mia Paid for by Friends of Mia Mason for Congress "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" "YouTube" ©2021 Mia Mason for Congress | 600-B Abruzzi Dr suite 112, Chester, MD 21619 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thanks for sharing your priorities with us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Thanks to everyone who took the opportunity to fill out our priorities survey!

We had an impressive response and the top 3 priorities chosen are:

1. Tackling Climate Change
2. Increasing COVID-19 Relief
3. Protecting Our Environment

Because of your responses, we know what matters to our district and our nation. Know I will continue to work everyday to accomplish our shared goals.

Know that we plan to get to work with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to tackle these urgent challenges. There has never been a more important time for us to course-correct our politics, and the secret ingredient to making that lasting change is you.

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

body:

The socialist agenda, led by AOC and Bernie Sanders, is gaining momentum all over the country, but we can't let socialism gain an inch of ground in Arkansas.
**[STAND AGAINST SOCIALISM](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h1EZtN2gyuoY-4IhEihzlZUYacbLmQCuA4xk43tMq3a42TiQ99-8sQ1ZQBhOh2GUZGHxWEivEFG027_VkhbnD9a2zVTJJOJ8K0kHZMOnkYxkbXG9yX9dAex6o_xAdWoR28jJ7Eofu4kfXMGNUR-gab9kcjuPAg-_W5lkVaE2O0VIiUyRtc5YkU-0UVTaIqeZLlboCz_44PjJ9A-oALRhUidKETRv_n1hrvR4jiPXOlDNnWH2G9pnvvdo3TPWIYQ-UnU-Xqeh_qvqip-c5ou7TBhqhVxiGqJpKGVULez9wJqC6kSwm_T1ft3DjHp7Yh5HovIdcp5DVOKs53inowiHhBfv1EMjxXfGG-EzrCFML0XzqcHAh_5wmvsV0fQiOzFDGOhyFGQYNPRC2mBHnl0cjyoQwA9DsOrOgy23nm1maunOwIkJ--FgJmApBgz89bApWC6BR69JXX3NXnjSsXB5uw==&c=ktrj8CG4hmoM7W_GlUs9tIupf8B05lYTJ-UhGSXCVeBbyRkBtMgLPg==&ch=vyVE8jiuR3cZYtboiam7h6dduq3f3cfIoKduWjNC_STcGNszksCnug==)**
I have always been clear on this, Friend. I will fight tooth and nail against The Green New Deal, Medicare for All, **and ALL socialist policies**.
**[STAND AGAINST SOCIALISM](hhttps://secure.winred.com/leslie-rutledge-for-governor-09f7ada1/stand-against-socialism/?utm_campaign=20210202_TY.100912_leslie-rutledge_t1047115-1750&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100912&utm_content=20210202_will-you-join-my-fight-against-socialism)**

name: Team Cammack
subject: It's personal...
body:
Fighting for life
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wemyIel0zhLaxdil1YDVq_MFIoIyVuznf2j3TPLFurm5RJgKvgbvFCt1z0NIklnxyjIc0gb0w4SzV53QIGqd62c_ZkkpE-vMUNNhtztGmwfpFOHEdDORp1_7x_fEHbB0h6g9jlP8ubyrSKWhREmwdD2Ermbbz6GQLrGwOp4WWfL0533BYfwVZA==&c=LK-swexzTQTDt2leL0Icr9IJCFAZUIEdapv5iO8pK-jnqc3f_4GgYA==&ch=Da2KKe4HnVaY7ic95DrfM_LSxKP_UYbj6GwKNCBudOY_OSQizN06Xg==)
---
| Patriot,
This past Thursday, Kat Cammack joined the virtual March for Life and spoke about the importance of this cause. For Kat, this issue is deeply personal, which is why she is and will always be Pro-Life.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wemyIel0zhLaxdil1YDVq_MFIoIyVuznf2j3TPLFurm5RJgKvgbvFCt1z0NIklnxovI-FRuREfAstlIDUoOLS1G7z6m6dzlWl-9ptquNFOv_jgB0xmkmFcaiDRA7nkQeLDoWzaQgZKXo8wJUg-v2Yppzh7l_xqbRCoT46_ip75PGk_1m012l7FtpRc5jIjQvpdba6iwr7QRK-gF20YePs-1EANnE-AByXejFwgJyMZyEuZDxiP-zJT6O9xjTi0z0dbMQgZGaXSDK8M7jD7Ke77m0ziXLot38mvVepTjck0c=&c=LK-swexzTQTDt2leL0Icr9IJCFAZUIEdapv5iO8pK-jnqc3f_4GgYA==&ch=Da2KKe4HnVaY7ic95DrfM_LSxKP_UYbj6GwKNCBudOY_OSQizN06Xg==)
---
| "Doctors told [my mom] then that future pregnancies would be extremely high risk. Years later, when she was pregnant with me, against the urging of her doctors, and even family, she did something incredible. She chose life. Her bravery and courage in the face of this difficult decision, led to my passion for standing up for the rights of the innocent, and the unborn. Life is sacred, the rights of unborn children are sacred."
It is wrong for the Biden administration to use American tax dollars to fund abortions domestically and abroad. 56% of Americans support the Hyde Amendment, which bars the use of federal funds to pay for abortion.
It is critical that the majority of Americans take a stand against repealing the Hyde Amendment. We urgently need your support to spread this message and safeguard this important legislation. [Can Kat count on your support?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wemyIel0zhLaxdil1YDVq_MFIoIyVuznf2j3TPLFurm5RJgKvgbvFCt1z0NIklnxyjIc0gb0w4SzV53QIGqd62c_ZkkpE-vMUNNhtztGmwfpFOHEdDORp1_7x_fEHbB0h6g9jlP8ubyrSKWhREmwdD2Ermbbz6GQLrGwOp4WWfL0533BYfwVZA==&c=LK-swexzTQTDt2leL0Icr9IJCFAZUIEdapv5iO8pK-jnqc3f_4GgYA==&ch=Da2KKe4HnVaY7ic95DrfM_LSxKP_UYbj6GwKNCBudOY_OSQizN06Xg==)

clean_body: Fighting for life | | | | | | == | Patriot, This past Thursday, Kat Cammack joined the virtual March for Life and spoke about the importance of this cause. For Kat, this issue is deeply personal, which is why she is and will always be Pro-Life. | == | "Doctors told [my mom] then that future pregnancies would be extremely high risk. Years later, when she was pregnant with me, against the urging of her doctors, and even family, she did something incredible. She chose life. Her bravery and courage in the face of this difficult decision, led to my passion for standing up for the rights of the innocent, and the unborn. Life is sacred, the rights of unborn children are sacred." It is wrong for the Biden administration to use American tax dollars to fund abortions domestically and abroad. 56% of Americans support the Hyde Amendment, which bars the use of federal funds to pay for abortion. It is critical that the majority of Americans take a stand against repealing the Hyde Amendment. We urgently need your support to spread this message and safeguard this important legislation. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Together, we can make a difference in the lives of many. Thank you! Respectfully, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Simona Grace
subject: A Real Marshall Plan for Moms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Peter
Did you have a chance to read my Op-ed in******[Ms. Magazine](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557913/271076549/-86897999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&emci=e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) **yesterday? My fight has always been about economic justice and equality for all, that's why I felt that it was important to add my voice to this conversation.
Last week, 50 prominent women placed a full-page paid ad in the New York Times calling attention to the issues that continue to disproportionately affect working mothers during this pandemic. The women asked President Biden to implement a “Marshall Plan for Moms” and pay mothers $2,400 a month for their [“unpaid labor](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557914/271076550/-367095860?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&emci=e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131).”
It is undeniable that working mothers are shouldering the brunt of the C0VID-19 pandemic. However, paying mothers to stay home will not lead us toward recovery—it will put women at an even greater disadvantage in the long run and have negative repercussions on the American economy. The only way to build back better and revive our economy is by getting women back to work.
Today, caring for children in America is the [leading cause of poverty](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557915/271076551/326596346?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&emci=e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131#endnotes). To solve this ongoing crisis, we need structural overhaul, affordable [child care](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557916/271076552/-1260931280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&emci=e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131), and policies in place that will benefit all working parents and caregivers regardless of gender. We need to create high-paying jobs with flexibility to provide a better balance between work and family responsibilities.
While a catchy slogan bringing awareness to an important issue, a true “Marshall Plan for Moms” should focus on preserving jobs and bringing women back to work. It is the only way toward inclusive economic recovery.
Please read my Oped in **[Ms. Magazine](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557917/271076553/-86897999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&emci=e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)** to learn more about my take on inclusive economic recovery for moms and for all working families who are struggling to make ends meet across the country.
Sincerely,
Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24557918/271076554/-2094846095?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=)
Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/e796567e-7d65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992/bd7a3f61-ae65-eb11-9889-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkN2EzZjYxLWFlNjUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L56iN937PZNSbs_mdUGZZYlF35jZfYPG2fE5I3U7jys=&id=103678513).

subject: DNC Technology Debrief Invitation...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- As Democrats, we have a lot to be proud of and to celebrate. Against extraordinary odds, our Party emerged from the 2020 Election cycle with distinct victories that were made possible through strong collaboration. We have rescheduled the DNC Technology Debrief that so many of you initially rsvped to attend so thank you for your patience. On **Wednesday, February 17 from 2:00 - 5:00pm ET/ 11:00am - 2:00pm PT** , please join the DNC for a debrief session with partners to discuss our data and counter-disinformation program, along with the innovative work that led to the successes of the 2020 election cycle. Below is the invitation with the RSVP link from DNC Executive Director Sam Cornale, I hope that you will be able to join! Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni |
---
| | | **Invitation from DNC Executive Director, Sam Cornale** Dear Friend, Please join us on **Wednesday, February 17 from 2:00 - 5:00pm ET/ 11:00am - 2:00pm PT** for a DNC Technology Debrief. This three-hour event will combine our previous events on data and counter-disinformation. The event will feature DNC Chair Jaime Harrison, former Chair Tom Perez, and former DNC Chair and Vermont Governor Howard Dean. Our discussion will dive into the DNC technology, data, and counter-disinformation programs in the 2020 election cycle, and showcase the innovative work of the Biden for President campaign, Democratic state parties, the Democratic Data Exchange, Emily's List, Priorities USA, and many more. **[Please RSVP Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1f3eeed7b5&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** ** ** We hope you can join us. Best, Sam

Derek, Ellie Warner here, Finance Director for Terry McAuliffe’s campaign for Governor of Virginia. I just finished crunching our January fundraising numbers, and I wanted to share a stat that we’re all buzzing about here at McAuliffe HQ: **In January, we received the highest number of individual contributions to our campaign in a single month so far. Thank you so much!** Terry’s fond of saying that this campaign will only be successful if we can build a grassroots movement that demands bold, progressive leadership for our Commonwealth. **[So today, we’ve decided to launch a new goal: 5,000 individual contributions in February. Can you make a donation of any amount right now to kick us off?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYRQKrZ8ARFkpGweTCuAdN58mlGqJEvH7I4IPYAidoSVrP_oJoHohAMmYOo95_x_kNW2-8HfDxfaT-OHEaeXRtgLLdzrmqk92gHHDiYmYO71Hk7IlUOnLXor3Ml0HwGnll8QBY2T686pu0mMkW54DxJoYas2j1-SGNS62mbZ4cm2jj8BfLV926jK9DBHKErBlnGDcUFIUqIa-YTPfU2nMt7R4mkP6MsYqfb8WkRMSmBCkwhp6iYdaUym4n66HrV2ml4PQ2Rgfxa31MB8rfaodft3HED0JaSq3u68SxjNkop13JKYU45A3GegJ4ciediboRw2AREYjts8qjdrLZp3w7BLiR9Pb1cug64pBQYKDfKS35VIdEilNuw7rTmNXwnoAuhmhAJ3qtFkENTWl2qTN-w/393/5yT00ZILTIaLBtAuYVO9uQ/h1/u6ZUwBKg21Qo0I6uW4lrYbflqJ6ajWxNl7Fl4Onvvw0)** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYRQKrZ8ARFkpGweTCuAdN65MjwuIX_KiYXrtb4MRqILZoT1vfG-MjS-1EWsUGX6vISbVzNN9OIgMMcW8_XA9k7ycAPqdUfnwZyfyOw5QxODBXBSB7-aZd2EjCuvbJo5CoTpojlVzhmSKL1eVEaLR9yRW4Xk4qkjwTVskv-jS_7ta9IUsU0kcgiy4NOiRs12pu2xkT95wM3Vc_W556Je-rK7F8wfRL3VpAa_1KY62-ecia58sQ_ZmaWFCKXmCb4FQ7kRvN8uHCxP7S5WnlqmajE-Z8wBZDeZ7J_zFoapf3lAmAneraVoH3AqslYY7c66wlFs5y67gFTnVqg8aSZwgzZwZsqV04o6_IQ79C8Ej-p0BtAaJ6SYKL9Izn2pA0ipyFgGcvo408V7DxYGa2cFV5M/393/5yT00ZILTIaLBtAuYVO9uQ/h2/1WUnQmcdHcFnH408cqelXOb0YqBtdQNYLEYDEf-nWk0)

Look, we obviously care about how much money we raise. Money allows us to reach more Virginians -- it allows us to hire more organizers and staff.
**But that’s not what this goal is about. We want to build our campaign from the ground up -- and that means getting buy-in from as many people as possible.**
This a grassroots movement -- and your support means the world to us.
Thank you,
Ellie Warner
Finance Director, Terry for Governor

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did YOU Just See Democrats Introduced a Mask Mandate Bill
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **These politicians in St Paul are drunk with power! They won't stop infringing on our liberties and messing with our lives until we all willfully comply with their authority. Well, I'm not on board. How about you?** A group of legislators [introduced a bill in the Minnesota House](https://www.action4liberty.com/legislators_introduce_mask_mandate_bill_in_mn_house?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=2) that would make Governor Walz' mask mandate into permanent law. It would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. Business owners who don't comply - well, they face up to 90 days of jail time. Sound familiar? This bill just mirrors what Governor Walz decreed already last summer. But unlike his illegal, unconstitutional and unilateral dictate, this would codify things into law. It's becoming more clear by the day what these politicians really want - more power over us. We're watching legislators on both sides of the aisle right now waste time in a committee tasked to draft a Fake End Walz' Power bill. They're even lecturing us on how we can appropriately petition our government. Last Friday, Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard, two of the six Democrat targets, [accused you and me of being "right wing, wack jobs" who are "intimidating them"](https://www.action4liberty.com/rep_lislegard_calls_you_whack_job?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=3). Even RINO lobbyist legislator Kurt Daudt joined with them in throwing you and me under the bus by stating how Republicans in St Paul do not condone you and me knocking on legislators' doors. What are they talking about?
## The State Capitol is closed to the public right now. We can't even meet with our legislators there!
Meanwhile, legislators are meeting remotely, using their homes to conduct business. Are they saying we no longer can petition our government for a redress of grievances? Of course, it's a one way street. These same crony politicians show up to our doors every election year, begging for our vote so they can get re-elected. But they don't want us knocking their doors demanding they vote better? As they raise the stakes and do more to encroach on our lives, we have two options. Do what most pitiful Republican groups in this state do and just give up. Democrats are used to a bunch of quitters as opposition. There's a reason they keep getting away with things.
## Or...
We up the ante. And that's exactly what we are doing at Action 4 Liberty. We are going to make these politicians' lives miserable, because quite frankly, that's what Governor Walz' Emergency Powers are doing to us and our beloved business owners. **Starting this weekend, Action 4 Liberty is moving up north into Reps Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard's districts. We are deploying a full time team of doorknockers and activists who will talk to every voter and find every supporter who shares our view to End Walz' Emergency Powers for good.** Our team will stand on street corners holding signs. They'll organize protests and build a larger activist footprint in their districts. And they'll meet with business owners impacted by Walz' orders and engage them in this fight. We already rented a home and hired more operators so we can double down our efforts. If these crony politicians think things were rough in January, they have a whole new thing coming their way. Sandstede and Lislegard are showing their true colors! When Rep Erik Mortensen brought forward the motion to End Walz' Emergency Powers, they sided with fringe, metro Democrats to protect their Governor. Their votes last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers were nothing more than a con. Our team will make sure their voters know about it. **Did you know that Julie Sandstede only won her election by 30 votes? And Donald Trump beat Sleepy Joe Biden by 5 points in Dave Lislegard's district last November. Voting to protect Governor Walz WILL cost them their seats! We'll make sure of that.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=4 "Support Our Field Operations") [Support Our Field Operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=5)
---
**What makes Action 4 Liberty different than most other groups in this state is that we refuse to quit - we owe it to you and all our supporters to find a way to win. We can't allow our system of government to be hijacked by these politicians any longer.**
I know it seems hopeless at times. Democrats are surging nationally \- emboldened by Joe Biden's victory. And their buddies in Big Tech and the media are doing their best to steer the people's attention away from their extreme, anti-liberty COVID response and towards the surge at the U.S. Capitol.
This isn't the first time we had a road block. When we started this battle back in April of last year, we only had 15 Republicans on board in the House for the first vote. So we put pressure on House Republicans to get on board. By the end of the month, we had all 59 of them.
In May, we couldn't get the Republican Senate to even bring up the Resolution for a vote. So we increased the pressure on Senate leadership, and by June we had them passing the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.
**Causing pain for politicians works. And we know the best places to put the pressure.[I hope we can count on you to help us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=6).**
By moving Action 4 Liberty up north, we will be making their lives miserable because they will hear from voters, business owners, neighbors and friends around the clock. Our team will identify swing voters and recruit candidates and activists to run campaigns. We'll stand on street corners and hold up signs. How would you like to see activists with signs that say:
# Julie Sandstede Betrayed YOU!
The Democrat establishment is growing more worried by the day that Action 4 Liberty and, the hundreds of thousands of people who support us, are not backing down. We are forcing their most vulnerable members to go down with the sinking ship of Walz' popularity in Greater Minnesota.
Help us continue fighting through these obstacles so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Let's make sure bills like this Mask Mandate have no chance of passing. And let's return our system of government back to its constitutional roots!
**Can I count on you to help us make things more painful for these politicians. Please help us with a[donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 or $25 can go along way to holding them accountable. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=7)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_we&n=10), software for leaders.

It would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. ---

---
| Sen. Jeb Bradley Files Bill to Stop PPP Tax
---
---
| |
---
| Friends, Today, Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley put forth a piece of legislation to finally fix the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) state tax problems for New Hampshire small businesses. Sen. Bradley's legislation will make it clear that small businesses receiving PPP Loans from the federal government will not be subject to either the state’s BET or BPT taxes. This will resolve one of the most pressing business taxation problems that the new Republican majority inherited upon retaking control of the legislature last year. ****[Read about it here!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjEyNTc1NzE3NjM0MDg2MjExJmM9eDFhOSZlPTE5MjgmYj01MTUxMTMwMDAmZD1kM3o3bDB0.Hp40eQQ6P74qEuxH4LrWuLu5Kkz9_VbPENDqaAxvXJY)
While Senate Republicans are looking to help small businesses and help families get back to work, Democrats would rather blame Governor Sununu to obscure their past support for higher business taxes! Help us fight back against the Democrats' false claims by [making a $5, $25, or $100 contribution to the NH Senate Republicans online here (Secure Link!)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjEyNTc1NzE3NjM0MDg2MjExJmM9eDFhOSZlPTE5MjgmYj01MTUxMTMwMjEmZD1jMG01bDlk.wVygiWgUVnNWzYUGb_R6y7-uomOTpVJrWSO7asqEsys)

---
---
| |
---
| |
---
The reason Granite State businesses face the prospect of having their PPP revenue taxed is because the state of New Hampshire last aligned its tax laws with the federal tax code in 2018. The congressional exemption is for 2020. “We need to update our laws and do it quickly if we want to protect our businesses from these taxes,” Bradley said. Tuesday morning, Bradley announced legislation to address the issue. “I’m going to introduce a late bill in the Rules Committee to make the change so businesses don’t have to pay state taxes on their PPP monies,” Bradley told NHJournal. “Republicans are well aware of the problem, and we know this has to get done.” \- NH Journal, Feb 2, 2021
